clusters.title: UCLA Bruins dominate South Carolina 79-51 to claim first women's basketball NCAA title
clusters.neutral_headline: UCLA storms past South Carolina to claim its 1st NCAA women's basketball title

items.title: UCLA Bruins dominate South Carolina 79-51 to claim first women's basketball NCAA title
items.standfirst: UCLA finished the season 37-1 by defeating the three-time national champion South Carolina Gamecocks.
items.content: UCLA finished the season 37-1 by defeating the three-time national champion South Carolina Gamecocks.

items.title: UCLA storms past South Carolina to claim its 1st NCAA women's basketball title
items.standfirst: UCLA secured the first NCAA women's basketball national championship in school history — a goal that was set after losing in the first Final Four last season.
items.content: UCLA secured the first NCAA women's basketball national championship in school history — a goal that was set after losing in the first Final Four last season.(Image credit: Rick Scuteri)

items.title: Who won UCLA vs South Carolina? #sports
items.standfirst: UCLA wins first women’s national title, beats South Carolina 79 51 UCLA capped a historic season with a dominant championship performance, defeating South Carolina 79 51 in the NCAA women’s national title game. Lauren Betts—part of the Bruins’ elite senior group—was central to the rout and later…
items.content: UCLA wins first women’s national title, beats South Carolina 79 51 UCLA capped a historic season with a dominant championship performance, defeating South Carolina 79 51 in the NCAA women’s national title game. Lauren Betts—part of the Bruins’ elite senior group—was central to the rout and later…

clusters.title: NASA Artemis II Astronauts Set to Fly by Far Side of the Moon
clusters.neutral_headline: NASA Artemis II Astronauts Set to Fly by Far Side of the Moon

items.title: NASA Artemis II Astronauts Set to Fly by Far Side of the Moon
items.standfirst: A NASA crew of four astronauts will fly by the moon on Monday at the closest distance they will get to the lunar surface during their mission and the nearest any human has gotten to the moon in more than 50 years.
items.content: A NASA crew of four astronauts will fly by the moon on Monday at the closest distance they will get to the lunar surface during their mission and the nearest any human has gotten to the moon in more than 50 years.

items.title: NASA's Artemis II crew readies for Monday's lunar flyby. Here's what you need to know
items.standfirst: At its closest point, the crew of Artemis II will loop about 4,000 miles from the lunar surface late Monday. The astronauts will also venture farther into space than any previous human mission.
items.content: At its closest point, the crew of Artemis II will loop about 4,000 miles from the lunar surface late Monday. The astronauts will also venture farther into space than any previous human mission.(Image credit: NASA via Getty Images)

clusters.title: Savannah Guthrie returns to NBC's Today show, as search for mother goes on
clusters.neutral_headline: Savannah Guthrie returns to NBC's Today show, as search for mother goes on

items.title: Savannah Guthrie returns to NBC's Today show, as search for mother goes on
items.standfirst: Nancy Guthrie disappeared from her home in Tucson, Arizona, in what authorities believe was an abduction.
items.content: Nancy Guthrie disappeared from her home in Tucson, Arizona, in what authorities believe was an abduction.

items.title: Savannah Guthrie returns to the 'Today' show months after her mother's disappearance
items.standfirst: Savannah Guthrie's mother, Nancy Guthrie, has not been seen since returning home from a family dinner the evening of Jan. 31.
items.content: Savannah Guthrie's mother, Nancy Guthrie, has not been seen since returning home from a family dinner the evening of Jan. 31.(Image credit: Dia Dipasupil)

clusters.title: New UK farm inheritance tax rule will cause ‘significant challenges’, say accountants
clusters.neutral_headline: How will new UK farm inheritance tax work? #politics

items.title: New UK farm inheritance tax rule will cause ‘significant challenges’, say accountants
items.standfirst: Levy on inherited farms and family businesses worth £2.5m or more comes into force 6 AprilA new inheritance tax regime for UK farms and family businesses comes into force on Monday and will present “significant challenges” for those affected, according to accountants.In October 2024 the government announced plans to levy inheritance tax on farms – prompting an outcry in many quarters. Continue reading...
items.content: Levy on inherited farms and family businesses worth £2.5m or more comes into force 6 AprilA new inheritance tax regime for UK farms and family businesses comes into force on Monday and will present “significant challenges” for those affected, according to accountants.In October 2024 the government announced plans to levy inheritance tax on farms – prompting an outcry in many quarters. Continue reading...

items.title: How will new UK farm inheritance tax work? #politics
items.standfirst: New UK farm inheritance tax rule begins A new inheritance tax regime for farms and family businesses in the UK takes effect on 6 April, creating what accountants described as “significant challenges.” The policy introduces a levy on inherited farms and certain family businesses valued at £2.5…
items.content: New UK farm inheritance tax rule begins A new inheritance tax regime for farms and family businesses in the UK takes effect on 6 April, creating what accountants described as “significant challenges.” The policy introduces a levy on inherited farms and certain family businesses valued at £2.5…

clusters.neutral_headline: 'Absolutely spectacular': Artemis II crew see first glimpse of far side of Moon

items.title: What NASA is looking for in the coming days as Artemis II loops around the moon
items.standfirst: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman outlined the most critical moments he expects in the coming days as Artemis II astronauts continue their journey around the far side of the moon.
items.content: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman outlined the most critical moments he expects in the coming days as Artemis II astronauts continue their journey around the far side of the moon.

items.title: Artemis II crew take new photo of far side of the moon
items.standfirst: The crew of NASA's Artemis II mission captured a new image of the far side of the moon, which the agency released Sunday.
items.content: The crew of NASA's Artemis II mission captured a new image of the far side of the moon, which the agency released Sunday.

items.title: 'Absolutely spectacular': Artemis II crew see first glimpse of far side of Moon
items.standfirst: Astronauts on the Artemis II mission are on the third day of their journey around the far side of the Moon.
items.content: Astronauts on the Artemis II mission are on the third day of their journey around the far side of the Moon.

clusters.title: Pope Leo calls for hope amid global conflicts on his first Easter as pontiff
clusters.neutral_headline: Pope Leo calls for global leaders to choose peace in his first Easter Mass

items.title: Pope Leo calls for hope amid global conflicts on his first Easter as pontiff
items.standfirst: Pope Leo XIV celebrated his first Easter Mass as pontiff, urging hope against the violence of war.
items.content: Pope Leo XIV celebrated his first Easter Mass as pontiff, urging hope against the violence of war.

items.title: Pope Leo calls for peace in first Easter Sunday address
items.standfirst: In his first Easter as Pontiff, Pope Leo, the First American pope, called for peace amid an American war in Iran. Chris Livesay reports.
items.content: In his first Easter as Pontiff, Pope Leo, the First American pope, called for peace amid an American war in Iran. Chris Livesay reports.

items.title: Pope Leo calls for global leaders to choose peace in his first Easter Mass
items.standfirst: Pope Leo XIV addressed thousands of worshippers gathered in St Peter's Square on Easter Sunday in his first address as pontiff.
items.content: Pope Leo XIV addressed thousands of worshippers gathered in St Peter's Square on Easter Sunday in his first address as pontiff.
